testcase.name: test_cover_fees_toggle_creates_new_pi
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_week1_blockers_iter107.py:217: in test_cover_fees_toggle_creates_new_pi assert r2.status_code == 200, f"cover_fees toggle failed: {r2.status_code} {r2.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: cover_fees toggle failed: 502 {"detail":"Stripe error: Keys for idempotent requests can only be used with the same parameters they were first used with. Try using a key other than 'solpay_pi_b97daf8088687e95a45de4fd636b718c' if you meant to execute a different request."} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_real_stripe_pi_confirm_donation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_week1_blockers_iter107.py:287: in test_real_stripe_pi_confirm_donation assert r2.status_code == 200, f"confirm-donation failed: {r2.status_code} {r2.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: confirm-donation failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","church_slug"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"payment_intent_id":"pi_3TRH7IFbuKBbxZK70dYzaRt8"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
